text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #3)
Yes, ports tree is up-to-date and I've tried to remove all mentioned in my first message tex- and texlive- ports and then reinstall them.

May be there's some other tex ports without tex- or texlive- beginning in its name?

And I'll try to remove /usr/local/share/texmf* folders.
